data.title: Solana-based derivatives DEX 01 relaunches as N1 with Arthur Hayes and VC support after two-year hiatus
data.description:
Two years ago, the Solana-based derivatives decentralized exchange, 01 went on an indefinite hiatus until today when it announced that it will relaunch as N1.  According to a post from its co-founder Dima Romanov, the exchange will have the support of Arthur Hayes and some other VCs. Further into the post, Dima also revealed a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-dex-01-relaunches-as-n1-arthur-hayes/

data.title: Top Crypto Market Maker Wintermute Opens New York Office Amid Trump Optimism: Report
data.description:
A crypto market maker is reportedly opening up a new office in New York due to the pro-crypto nature of President Donald Trump. According to a new report from Bloomberg, crypto liquidity provider Wintermute – which already has offices in London and Singapore – is looking to venture into the US for the first time. […]
The post Top Crypto Market Maker Wintermute Opens New York Office Amid Trump...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/19/top-crypto-market-maker-wintermute-opens-new-york-office-amid-trump-optimism-report/

data.title: Nigeria sues Binance for $81.5B over alleged economic losses and tax evasion
data.description:
The Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS) of Nigeria has filed suit against Binance, a leading cryptocurrency exchange.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nigeria-sues-binance-for-81-5b/

data.title: Braza launches Brazilian real-pegged stablecoin on XRPL
data.description:
Braza, a financial technology group, has disclosed that it will release a new stablecoin associated with Brazilian Real and run it on the XRP Ledger (XRPL). The digital asset is likely to be out in the market by the first quarter of this year as part of the firm’s Braza On app. Marcelo Sacomori, the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/braza-launches-brazilian-stablecoin-on-xrpl/

data.title: 86% of crypto traders lost money to president Javier Milei’s rug pull
data.description:
Javier Milei’s crypto stunt wiped out $251 million in trader losses overnight. The Argentine president endorsed a Solana-based memecoin, $LIBRA, on Friday, pushing its value to $4.5 billion before it collapsed. According to a research note from Nansen today, 86% of all traders who invested in $LIBRA lost money, while a handful of insiders walked […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/86-of-crypto-traders-lost-money-to-president-javier-mileis-rug-pull/

data.title: Alongside team receives $9 million in strategic financing, led by a16z
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Universal project and Alongside platform development team have completed a strategic financing of US$9 million, led by Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) and participated by Coinbase and others. It is reported that the funds will be used to support its uAsset cross-chain liquidity solution. uAssets uses a "burn-cast" mechanism and Coinbase custody to transfer assets between different blockchains (such as SUI, Ripple, and Dogecoin). It has been launched on Polygon, Arbitrum, and Base, and plans to expand to all EVM chains and more ecosystems.

data.title: Coinbase CEO: I am not a Meme coin trader, and Coinbase will adhere to the principles of "free market capitalism" when listing coins
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong expressed his views on the craze for Meme coins on the X platform. He said that although he himself is not a Meme coin trader, he believes that Meme coins have become a phenomenon that cannot be ignored in the field of cryptocurrency. From the early Dogecoin to the various Meme coins today, these tokens may seem like "toys" at the beginning, but may evolve into more powerful tools over time. Regarding Coinbase's listing standards, Brian Armstrong said that from the first principle, we believe in free market capitalism. If our customers want it and it is legal, our goal is to let them make their own choices. But our job is to provide them with the best information we can find so that they can make an informed choice. If the token is a scam or fraud, we will delete it. But if it is just of low quality, customers should be able to see comments or community notes and make their own choices. We want to provide consumers with useful information, not play the role of judge and jury, or approve/recommend investments.

data.title: Binance sued in Nigeria, ordered to pay $81 billion in fines
data.description: Nigerian authorities are suing cryptocurrency exchange Binance for more than $79 billion in economic losses and $2 billion in back taxes. The amount is almost 19 times the $4.3 billion fine Binance paid in 2023 after admitting to violating U.S. banking laws. Nigeria's tax authority, the Federal Inland Revenue Service (FIRS), also claimed that Binance was operating illegally in the country, according to reports.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Expresses Reduced Confidence In 2025 Economic Outlook
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Raphael Bostic has expressed diminished confidence in the economic outlook for 2025. Bostic noted the difficulty in accounting for all potential policy changes in economic forecasts and stated that inflation progress is unlikely to follow a linear path. He highlighted that the Federal Reserve did not significantly cut interest rates last year, maintaining a restrictive policy stance. Bostic expressed satisfaction with the decision to pause rate cuts to observe economic developments. He also mentioned that the Federal Reserve is nearing the threshold level of its balance sheet, with the debt ceiling being a factor in this determination. Bostic emphasized the importance of regularly monitoring the balance sheet to ensure that asset reduction does not become excessive.

data.title: Montana's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Legislation Advances to House Vote
data.description: According to Odaily, Montana's strategic Bitcoin reserve legislation has successfully passed committee review and is now set to proceed to a vote in the House. Previously reported on February 9, House Bill 429 in Montana will authorize the state treasurer to invest up to $50 million from the general fund into digital assets with a market capitalization exceeding $750 billion, specifically Bitcoin, by July 15, 2025. These investments must be held by qualified custodians or managed through trading platform funds.
